(1)

The purpose of this Regulation is to improve the functioning of the internal market.

Article 1

Subject matter

1. This Regulation lays down harmonised rules.

(a)

rules for placing on the market;

(b)

prohibitions of certain practices.

2. This Regulation applies to providers and deployers.

Article 2

Definitions

For the purposes of this Regulation, definitions apply.

ANNEX I

High-risk areas

Systems listed below are high-risk:

Section A. Old approach

1.

Employment:

(a)

recruitment systems;

(b)

promotion decisions.

2.

 Directive 2006/42/EC (OJ L 157);

Section B. New approach

1.

Credit scoring systems.

ANNEX II

List of offences

Criminal offences referred to in Article 5:

—

terrorism,

—

trafficking in human beings,

1.

This point is enumerated via a wrapper div.
